/usr/bin/c++  -std=c++11 -Wall -Wno-unused-result -Wno-pessimizing-move -Wno-deprecated-declarations -O3 -DNDEBUG -rdynamic -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/SpeedTest.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/SpeedTest.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpeedTest.dir/SpeedTest.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpeedTest.dir/SpeedTestClient.cpp.o CMakeFiles/SpeedTest.dir/MD5Util.cpp.o -o SpeedTest  -lcurl -lxml2 -lpthread -lssl -lcrypto
